scripts.dev: npm run build:client && flue dev --target cloudflare
scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run astro:check
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npm run preview:upload --
scripts.migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run migrate:production && wrangler deploy --config dist/enchiridion/wrangler.json
scripts.dry-run: npm run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config dist/enchiridion/wrangler.json
